name: Confronting the "C"
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>対</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>峙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>する<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｇ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ジー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent Special Summons a monster(s) from the Extra Deck (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If you do, this card is unaffected by monster effects that target this card.
mnst_eff: When your opponent Special Summons a monster(s) from the Extra Deck (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If you do, this card is unaffected by monster effects that target this card.
eff: When your opponent Special Summons a monster(s) from the Extra Deck (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If you do, this card is unaffected by monster effects that target this card.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
